title: Legacy VanillaFix
description: A port of Runemoro's VanillaFix to Legacy Fabric 1.8.9
body:
*This mod does not require the Legacy Fabric API, but it is recommended you have the Resource Loader and Crash Report Info parts of the API installed.*


## Legacy VanillaFix

A port of Runemoro's VanillaFix to Legacy Fabric with a few extras

## Features:
 * Better Crashes: Minecraft will no longer fully crash, but rather will redirect you to a menu where you can choose to:
   * Go back to the main menu
   * Upload the crash report to a paste website
* Catch crashes during startup: Minecraft will still start even if a fatal error was thrown by a mod,
unfortunately you can't play, but a menu will tell you which mod caused the crash.

* Faster interdimensional teleportation
* Particle culling
* The ability to open GUIs in nether portals
* Disable loading spawn chunks for faster load times
* Thirdperson camera passes throught non-solid objects
* Pressing F11 (fullscreen toggle) will save fullscreen setting in options
* Allows semi-transparent pixels on skins to properly render
* Fixes the sky darkening when the player stands inside a block
* Fixes the player hand glitching out when riding an entity.

## Planned Features
* ~~Smart Animations option~~ (just use Optifine, this feature is discontinued in this mod)

## **Credits**
Mod Identification code for crashes is from [**Not Enough Crashes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)

Fullscreen option not saving fix is from [**Borderless Mining**](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining)

This mod *used* to include the entirety of [**MixinTrace**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace)
